query:
SELECT id, status, startedAt, completedAt, 
       feedsFetched, feedErrors, articlesIngested, projectsCreated,
       errors, currentStep, lastActivityNote, triggeredBy
FROM pipelineRuns 
WHERE id = 1650001;
